content_html:
Who Is Faith Ordway?

Faith Ordway is an American social media personality, TikTok star, fitness creator, and aspiring musician from Defiance, Ohio. Born on May 23, 2001, she rose to prominence through dance videos on TikTok, where she has amassed over 5 million followers and 243.9 million likes on her @faithordway7 account as of March 2026, placing her among the most-liked creators on the platform relative to her follower count.

Faith's content spans dance trends, fitness routines, lifestyle vlogs, and brand collaborations. She is a brand ambassador for YoungLA, the athletic apparel company, and has partnered with brands including Novashine. In 2025, she expanded into music, releasing her first music video on YouTube and signaling a creative pivot beyond pure social media content.

Follower Milestones

5M+

TikTok Followers

243.9M+

TikTok Likes

49:1

Like-to-Follower Ratio

Early Life and Background

Faith Ordway was born on May 23, 2001, in Defiance, Ohio, a small city in the northwestern corner of the state. Growing up in a small-town Midwestern environment, she developed an early interest in dance and social media content creation. Her parents have appeared in several of her TikTok videos, suggesting a supportive family dynamic around her content career.

She launched her TikTok account in April 2019, during the platform's explosive growth phase in the United States. At the time she was 17 years old, still completing her secondary education. The timing proved advantageous: she entered TikTok early enough to ride the platform's algorithmic growth wave while developing her content style before the market became saturated with lifestyle creators.

Rise to Fame on TikTok

Faith's early TikTok content focused primarily on dance videos set to trending audio clips. Her breakout moment came in February 2020 when she posted a duet with fellow TikTok star Charli D'Amelio, at the time the most-followed creator on the platform. The exposure introduced Faith to a massive new audience and triggered a sustained growth period.

Several viral moments punctuated her rise. A slow-motion hair flip video showcasing a new hair color became one of her most-watched posts. In November 2021, a lip-sync video set to a voice clip from the animated series Big Mouth surpassed 1.2 million hearts, demonstrating that her appeal extended beyond dance into comedy and personality-driven content.

By 2022, Faith had crossed 2 million TikTok followers and transitioned from organic content creation into the professional influencer space, securing her first brand partnerships and building a team to manage her growing commercial opportunities.

Key Career Milestones

  • April 2019 - Launched TikTok account with dance content
  • February 2020 - Viral duet with Charli D'Amelio, major follower surge
  • November 2021 - Big Mouth lip-sync video hits 1.2M+ hearts
  • 2023 - Became YoungLA brand ambassador, fitness content pivot
  • 2025 - Released first music video on YouTube
  • March 2026 - 5M+ followers, 243.9M+ likes on TikTok

Content Style and Niche

Faith Ordway's content has evolved through several distinct phases since her 2019 debut. Her current content mix includes:

  • Dance and trend videos - the foundation of her TikTok presence, where she participates in trending choreography and audio challenges
  • Fitness and gym content - reflecting her partnership with YoungLA and her personal interest in strength training and physique development
  • Lifestyle vlogs - particularly on YouTube (@realfaithordway), where she posts longer-form day-in-the-life content and Q&As
  • Fashion and modeling content on Instagram (@faithordway), featuring activewear photography alongside brand advertisements
  • Music - a newer vertical she signaled with a music video release on YouTube in 2025

Brand Partnerships and Monetization

At the 5M follower tier, Faith Ordway operates in the upper tier of TikTok influencers where brand partnership rates typically range from $10,000 to $30,000+ per sponsored post, with multi-platform campaigns commanding significantly higher fees. Her confirmed partnerships include:

  • YoungLA - the Los Angeles-based athletic apparel brand. Faith serves as a named brand ambassador with a personal discount code ("FAITH"), indicating a long-term contractual relationship rather than a one-off sponsorship
  • Novashine - a teeth-whitening and beauty brand that has partnered with numerous TikTok and Instagram influencers in the lifestyle space

Her engagement metrics, particularly the 243.9 million total likes across 5 million followers (a ratio of nearly 49 likes per follower), make her an exceptionally attractive partner for brands seeking high-engagement creators. This ratio places her well above the TikTok platform average.

Music Career

In 2025, Faith expanded into music, releasing a music video on YouTube that she promotes directly in her TikTok bio. The move from social media personality to musician follows a path blazed by other TikTok-native creators. Faith's transition appears organic, growing out of her dance and audio-driven content rather than being imposed by a label strategy.

Her TikTok bio links directly to the music video on YouTube, indicating she is using her existing 5M+ follower base as a built-in marketing channel for music discovery. As of March 2026, the music career remains in its early stages with significant room for growth.

Platform Presence

  • TikTok: @faithordway7 - 5M+ followers, 243.9M+ likes
  • Instagram: @faithordway - fitness and lifestyle photography
  • YouTube: @realfaithordway - vlogs and music
  • Business Contact: faith@hma.co (HMA talent management)
